content.text:
Based on the image provided, I can now clearly identify the neighbor atoms of atom C:2 (carbon with atomic index 2).

Looking at the molecular structure, atom C:2 is connected to:
- C:1 (carbon with index 1) - yellow/gold sphere directly bonded to C:2
- C:17 (carbon with index 17) - yellow/gold sphere directly bonded to C:2
- N:3 (nitrogen with index 3) - blue sphere directly bonded to C:2

The geomconf_index for this molecule is 257, as indicated by the filename "geomconf_257.xyz".

Therefore, the neighbor atoms of atom C:2 are:
- Atomic index 1, element C
- Atomic index 17, element C  
- Atomic index 3, element N

Geomconf_index: 257

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 2, whose element should be C. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
